item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.93,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"入职流程这周处理三处：移除旧表单、换群管理员、补医保附件。今天要放一个设备领取入口，请帮我排步骤。"}],"abstain_reason":"Only one current turn is provided; it lists mixed onboarding-process changes and a request to arrange steps, without evidence of at least three prior failed same-means local repairs or same-class recurrence."}
